content:
I need some sort of inner chemical shift. I struggle to connect with my feelings and emotions. It's a conscious and logic process. Same for empathy. It's not a natural thing for me. 
But I want it to be. I want to care. Rather than everything being a choice. 
And I want community and connection. I need to break my social anxiety. I learn and feel from others experiences. 
I want to feel novelty and wonder again. I get this with thrill seeking now but I want it in my every day life. I want more than feeling content. I want the range of emotions and experiences that life has to offer. 
I just feel like my existing is so limited and I want to be whole.

I'm really ok though. I know the version of me I want to become can't exist without this version of me going through this pain. I am still walking
